unresolved_behavior_cases.name: ValueTest.integers
unresolved_behavior_cases.reason: source_context_too_large_for_adapter_conversion
last_errors: The source test context exceeds the configured per-case budget and is not sent to the LLM. source_context_chars=27740, limit=20000, reason=full_test_definition_exceeds_limit.

unresolved_behavior_cases.name: CharReaderAllowDropNullTest.issue178
unresolved_behavior_cases.reason: Missing target API for object/array element access (Index trait not in allowed UUIDs) necessary to verify null placeholders and array indices.
last_errors: Source test checks root["a"] and arrGetAnd(index). Allowed target APIs do not include indexing methods for JsonValue or Object. Cannot replicate assertions without indexing.

unresolved_behavior_cases.name: CharReaderAllowNumericKeysTest.allowNumericKeys
unresolved_behavior_cases.reason: Missing target API for object field access (root.get(key, default) not available; Index trait not allowed).
last_errors: Source test uses root.get("15", false) and similar. No equivalent method in allowed target APIs.

unresolved_behavior_cases.name: CharReaderAllowSingleQuotesTest.issue182
unresolved_behavior_cases.reason: Missing target API for object field access and string extraction via root["a"].asString().
last_errors: Source test uses root["a"].asString() and root.get. Neither are available with allowed target APIs.

unresolved_behavior_cases.name: CharReaderAllowSpecialFloatsTest.issue209
unresolved_behavior_cases.reason: Missing target API for object field access (root.get and root["a"]) needed to verify special float values in object context.
last_errors: Source test checks root["a"].asDouble(), root.get("b",0.0), etc. Allowed target APIs lack indexing to access these fields.

unresolved_behavior_cases.name: CharReaderAllowZeroesTest.issue176
unresolved_behavior_cases.reason: Missing target API for object field access (root.get and root["a"].asString()); also test uses allowSingleQuotes setting which has no target equivalent.
last_errors: Source test code identical to allowSingleQuotes case, same API limitations apply.

unresolved_behavior_cases.name: CharReaderFailIfExtraTest.commentAfterArray
unresolved_behavior_cases.reason: Missing target API for array element access (root[1u]) required to verify parsed value.
last_errors: Source test checks root[1u] == "value". No array indexing method in allowed target APIs.

unresolved_behavior_cases.name: CharReaderFailIfExtraTest.commentAfterObject
unresolved_behavior_cases.reason: Missing target API for object field access (root["property"]) required to verify parsed value.
last_errors: Source test checks root["property"] == "value". No object indexing in allowed target APIs.

unresolved_behavior_cases.name: CharReaderFailIfExtraTest.issue107
unresolved_behavior_cases.reason: Cannot replicate source assertion root.asInt() after failed parse because target parse returns Err with no value on failure, and as_i64 cannot be called.
last_errors: Source expects parse to fail but still provide root with int value 1. Target API does not support extracting value from error.

unresolved_behavior_cases.name: CharReaderFailIfExtraTest.issue164
unresolved_behavior_cases.reason: Target does not support CharReaderBuilder settings (failIfExtra, strictMode). The source test sets multiple settings that produce different parse outcomes for the same document, which cannot be replicated in the target where parse has a single behavior.
last_errors: The source test has four blocks with different settings; the target has no equivalent settings API. Cannot deterministically replay observable behavior.

unresolved_behavior_cases.name: FuzzTest.fuzzDoesntCrash
unresolved_behavior_cases.reason: No observable behavior for aligned source function size in the test; the test only calls a non-aligned fuzz function.
last_errors: The source test does not contain any assertion or usage of the aligned source function size. The only assertion is on the return value of LLVMFuzzerTestOneInput, which is not aligned. Cannot derive expected behavior for size.

unresolved_behavior_cases.name: IteratorTest.indexes
unresolved_behavior_cases.reason: Target array iteration does not expose key/name/index.
last_errors: Source test accesses key(), name(), index() on an array iterator. Rust members_mut on array yields only values, without key information. These methods are not available in the target API.

unresolved_behavior_cases.name: IteratorTest.names
unresolved_behavior_cases.reason: Target object iteration does not expose key/name/memberName.
last_errors: Source test accesses key(), name(), memberName() on an object iterator. Rust members on object yields only values, without key information. These methods are not available in the target API.

unresolved_behavior_cases.name: ParseWithStructuredErrorsTest.singleError
unresolved_behavior_cases.reason: Target parse function does not return structured errors with offsets and messages; cannot replay structured error verification.
last_errors: The source test expects parse failure with specific offset_start=2, offset_limit=3, message='Missing ' or object member name'. The target crate's parse() returns Result<JsonValue> with limited error variants (e.g., UnexpectedCharacter) and no position information. Cannot replicate the structured error assertion.

unresolved_behavior_cases.name: ValueTest.arrayInsertAtRandomIndex
unresolved_behavior_cases.reason: Target does not provide equivalent array insertion and indexing APIs to replay the observed behavior; aligned source function (Value constructor) alone is insufficient to replicate the test's observable behavior.
last_errors: Source test heavily uses array.insert, operator[], front, back, and address comparisons. Target lacks IndexMut for arrays, no insert function, and no front/back methods within the allowed API set. A meaningful replay cannot be constructed.

unresolved_behavior_cases.name: ValueTest.arrays
unresolved_behavior_cases.reason: Target does not provide array index access or mutable index assignment needed to replicate the test's observable behavior; aligned APIs are insufficient.
last_errors: Source test uses array element access via operator[] (const and non-const), front(), back(), and removal. Target lacks Index/IndexMut for arrays, and front/back methods. The aligned APIs (Value constructor, type predicates, removeIndex) cannot reproduce the element access and modification checks.

unresolved_behavior_cases.name: ValueTest.compareArray
unresolved_behavior_cases.reason: Aligned source function (Value constructor) is not used in the test; the test uses copy construction and comparison predicates that cannot be mapped to the aligned target API.
last_errors: Source test creates arrays via append and then compares using checkIsLess/checkIsEqual. The aligned function is Value(const char*) which is not used. No target equivalent for copy construction or comparison exist in the allowed set.

unresolved_behavior_cases.name: ValueTest.compareNull
unresolved_behavior_cases.reason: Aligned source function (Value constructor) does not match the test usage; test uses default constructor and nullSingleton, not string constructor.
last_errors: The aligned source function is Value(const char*), but the test uses Value() (default) and Json::Value::nullSingleton(). No target equivalent for default construction or null singleton is available in the aligned functions.

unresolved_behavior_cases.name: ValueTest.compareObject
unresolved_behavior_cases.reason: Aligned source function (Value constructor) does not match the test usage; test creates objects via bracket assignment and compares using checkIsLess/checkIsEqual.
last_errors: The aligned source function is Value(const char*), but the test uses operator[] to build objects. No target equivalents for object construction via indexing or comparison are available in the allowed set.

unresolved_behavior_cases.name: ValueTest.compareType
unresolved_behavior_cases.reason: target lacks ordering comparison functions to replicate checkIsLess semantics
last_errors: Source test requires operator< for Json::Value of different types, which has no direct target equivalent (PartialOrd not implemented). Aligned source function only covers constructor; cannot reproduce observable ordering behavior.

unresolved_behavior_cases.name: ValueTest.copyMoveArray
unresolved_behavior_cases.reason: target does not expose array indexing or get methods required for element access
last_errors: Source test copies/moves array and accesses elements via operator[]. Target lacks public array indexing (Index<usize>) and get() in allowed APIs. Cannot replay element assertions.

unresolved_behavior_cases.name: ValueTest.nonIntegers
unresolved_behavior_cases.reason: aligned source functions do not match the test's numeric usage
last_errors: Aligned source functions include only the string constructor and is* methods, but source test primarily uses double constructor (not aligned) and as*/isConvertibleTo APIs not in aligned set. Cannot construct a meaningful test upholding source-grounded expectations.

unresolved_behavior_cases.name: ValueTest.precision
unresolved_behavior_cases.reason: target lacks configurable precision in stringify
last_errors: Source test uses StreamWriterBuilder with precision settings. Target stringify uses fixed dump format with no exposed precision controls. Cannot reproduce the precision-specific expected strings.

unresolved_behavior_cases.name: IteratorTest.staticStringKey
unresolved_behavior_cases.reason: unresolved_behavior_case_conversion
last_errors: case main_iteratortest_staticstringkey: model returned unresolved, reason=Target API does not provide a public method to retrieve object keys during iteration; cannot replay key() assertion., details=The source test uses Json::Value::begin().key() to retrieve the first key. The target crate provides members_mut() which iterates over values only; there is no public API to enumerate keys. Replaying the test would require a different assertion behavior, which is not allowed.

case main_readertest_allowdroppednullplaceholders: model returned unresolved, reason=Target parse function does not support allowDroppedNullPlaceholders feature., details=Source test uses Reader with allowDroppedNullPlaceholders_=true to parse [1,,2] and expects null placeholder. Target parse() does not support this configuration; the input is invalid JSON in standard parsing.

case main_readertest_allownumerickeystest: model returned unresolved, reason=Target parse function does not support allowNumericKeys feature., details=Source test uses Reader with allowNumericKeys_=true to parse '{ 123 : "abc" }'. Target parse() does not support this configuration.

unresolved_behavior_cases.name: ValueTest.arrayIssue252
unresolved_behavior_cases.reason: unresolved_behavior_case_conversion
last_errors: case main_valuetest_arrayissue252: model returned unresolved, reason=Source test does not provide an observable assertion or expected behavior for the aligned source function (size); the only relevant assertion is commented out., details=Aligned source function is Json::Value::size, but the test body contains no call to size and the assertion that would have used size is commented out. No expected behavior can be derived from the source test.

summary.note: public_replay_pass_rate only describes this replay plan; compare replay_plan_fingerprint across runs before comparing pass rates.

source_test_evidence_coverage.description: 3A aligned source 函数中，有 src 测试证据的比例

precise_behavior_evidence_rate.description: public source 函数中，从 leaf-name 测试证据进一步确认有精确行为证据的比例

source_tested_public_function_replay_gap.description: L1 scope 中有精确 src 测试证据但 adapter 未 replay 的 source 函数比例

public_replay_pass_rate.description: 当前已生成 replay plan 内，public replay 通过的 event 数 / public replay 实际执行的 event 数；这是 scoped pass rate，不代表全部 eligible source behavior cases 的全局通过率

aligned_source_replay_coverage.description: L1 source scope 中被 replay 覆盖且通过 3A 对齐验证的 source 函数比例

aligned_target_replay_coverage.description: L1 target scope 中被 replay 触达且通过 3A 对齐验证的 target 函数比例

behavior_case_accounting_rate.description: eligible source behavior cases 中，已 replay 或明确标记为无法转换的比例

behavior_case_replay_coverage.description: eligible source behavior cases 中，成功转换为 replay event 并进入 Rust replay plan 的比例
